title: DBSplitter
description: DBSplitter will generate DBInputSplits to use with DataDrivenDBInputFormat. DBSplitter implementations should perform this for a data type or family of data types. DataDrivenDBInputFormat needs to interpolate between two values that represent the lowest and highest valued records to import.

raw_response:
TITLE: DBSplitter

DESCRIPTION:
DBSplitter will generate DBInputSplits to use with DataDrivenDBInputFormat. DBSplitter implementations should perform this for a data type or family of data types. DataDrivenDBInputFormat needs to interpolate between two values that represent the lowest and highest valued records to import.
